items.name: Immortal hat: Emerald Echo hat
items.description:
The Emerald Echo radiates vibrant energy, like a fresh breeze through ancient forests. Its gleaming green finish shifts like sunlight over leaves, symbolizing growth, clarity, and confidence. The silver band adds balance and polish, elevating your style while keeping things grounded. Whether you're wandering city streets or standing out in a crowd, this fedora is your call to lead with calm charisma and sharp presence. A timeless piece for those who let their style speak before words do.

Price: 799/10 stock
Purchase Game: https://www.roblox.com/games/73736600148167
